h1.visual_description: Centered, bold, serif font, preceded by a numeric section identifier. Significant whitespace above and below.
h1.example_text: 8 Choosing between Observer Models and Rejecting Participants

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample; typically would be left-aligned bold or italicized serif if following academic journal conventions.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small-font block at the bottom of the page separated by a horizontal rule.
Superscript Arabic numerals within the body text.
Italicized terms within body text (e.g., Deviance, saturated).
Small caps used for acronyms (e.g., AIC, BIC).

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX inline for variables and formulas (e.g., $G^2$, $\chi^2$, $-2 \times \text{log likelihood}$)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric superscript footnotes for discursive citations; parenthetical acronyms for metric references.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top left: Page number (e.g., 316). Top right: Author surname in all caps (e.g., YARROW). Bottom: Footnote separator line and associated text.
